title: structure galore
description: This mods adds new structures to the game and more!
body:
This mods adds lots of new features! Like structures, Ores, Dimensions, Weapons, AND MUCH MORE!
The only dimension the Goo Demension will mimic the overworld. Why it does this? Well its so you can travel! The block in the dimension will make you fast. So you travel really far and make a new portal. And there you are across the world.
There is also ruby ore when you mine it you will get a ruby chunk.
Then you put the ruby chunk in a stonecutter to get a ruby!
There is also a fire blade that shoots fire!
You need a netherite sword to craft it
